response.justification: Bogdan has an impressive and extensive background in fullstack development with deep expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and various other technologies. While his experience leans more toward senior-level roles, his adaptability, open-source contributions, and demonstrated ability to work across the entire stack (from frontend to infrastructure) align well with the Junior/Mid-Level Fullstack Developer role. His recent work in AI-agent infrastructure and Kubernetes further strengthens his profile, though his lack of direct PostgreSQL experience and limited exposure to the renewable energy sector are minor concerns.
strengths: Extensive fullstack development experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React across multiple industries
Strong background in scalable architectures, microservices, and DevOps (Docker, Kubernetes, AWS CDK)
Proven ability to learn quickly, contribute to open-source projects, and mentor others
concerns: Current role is at a senior/staff level, which may indicate overqualification for a junior/mid-level position
Limited direct experience with PostgreSQL and renewable energy/construction technology domains
No explicit mention of REST API design or integration with CRM/document management systems

key_factors.factor: Experience level alignment with role seniority
